pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java compiler source and target properties from 11 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code using Java 21 features (e.g., pattern matching, records) will fail to compile with source/target 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin configuration to use Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Mismatch between plugin config and project properties causes compilation errors for Java 21 features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-javadoc-plugin configuration to use Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Javadoc generation fails if the source version in the plugin does not match the compiled classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add maven-enforcer-plugin rule to require Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Prevents accidental builds on incompatible JDKs, ensuring the project runs on the intended runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Jetty 10 (javax.servlet) with Jetty 12 (jakarta.servlet) for Prometheus exporter.
pom.xml.why_exists: Jetty 10 uses javax.servlet which is incompatible with Jakarta EE 10+ environments often targeted by Java 21 apps; Jetty 12 provides jakarta.servlet support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace old Prometheus simpleclient libraries with new prometheus-metrics instrumentation libraries.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old simpleclient libraries are deprecated and may not support newer JDKs or Jakarta Servlet APIs correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update nlf_01 dependency to version 4.0.0.
pom.xml.why_exists: Version 4.0.0 likely contains breaking API changes or requires Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update rlp_01 dependency to version 5.0.0.
pom.xml.why_exists: Major version bump indicates potential breaking changes or JDK 21 alignment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Azure Event Hubs dependency to version 5.21.3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Newer SDK versions often drop support for older JDKs or change API signatures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Azure Event Hubs Checkpoint Store dependency to version 1.21.5.
pom.xml.why_exists: Aligns with the updated Event Hubs client and ensures compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Azure Identity dependency to version 1.18.2.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures compatibility with other updated Azure SDK components and JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Azure Key Vault JCA provider dependency.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for new functionality using Managed Identity or Key Vault integration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta JSON API and Parsson implementation dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Replaces Gson for JSON processing, aligning with Jakarta EE standards.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add AKV_01 dependency.
pom.xml.why_exists: New plugin functionality requirement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add HTTP Core 5 dependency.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required by newer Azure SDK versions or other dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Gson dependency.
pom.xml.why_exists: Replaced by Jakarta JSON API.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spotless Maven plugin for code formatting.
pom.xml.why_exists: Enforces consistent code style across the project.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JaCoCo Maven plugin for code coverage.
pom.xml.why_exists: Enables code coverage reporting.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Checkstyle Maven plugin with extensive rules.
pom.xml.why_exists: Enforces code quality standards.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add SpotBugs Maven plugin for static analysis.
pom.xml.why_exists: Detects potential bugs in the code.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Maven Shade plugin with Maven Assembly plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Assembly plugin provides more control over the final JAR structure, often preferred for complex dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update JUnit dependencies to version 6.0.3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Newer JUnit version supports Java 21 features and improves test stability.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Log4j2 dependencies to version 2.25.4.
pom.xml.why_exists: Security patches and bug fixes in newer Log4j2 versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update SLF4J API dependency to version 2.0.17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Aligns with Log4j2 version and ensures compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Metrics dependency to version 4.2.38.
pom.xml.why_exists: Bug fixes and improvements in the metrics library.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add test dependencies for RLP server and EqualsVerifier.
pom.xml.why_exists: Supports new testing requirements.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Enforcer plugin to version 3.6.2.
pom.xml.why_exists: Newer version supports more rules and is compatible with newer Maven versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add distribution management configuration for GitHub Packages.
pom.xml.why_exists: Enables publishing artifacts to GitHub Packages.

pom.xml.general_idea: Reorder properties and sections in pom.xml for better readability.
pom.xml.why_exists: Improves maintainability of the POM file.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.general_idea: Replace direct RelpConnection usage with a connection pool abstraction for better resource management.
Update configuration class import to match new naming convention.
Remove unused metric imports that are no longer manually managed in this class.
Remove unused exception imports related to the old connection logic.
Remove static import for metric naming helper as metrics are now handled by the pool factory.
Add Javadoc comment to clarify the class purpose and thread-safety requirement.
Change class visibility from package-private to public.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.after: public final class DefaultOutput implements Output {

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.general_idea: Replace individual connection and metric fields with a single connection pool field.
Refactor constructor to initialize the connection pool instead of manual connection and metric setup.
Remove manual connection logic as it is now handled by the pool.
Add secondary constructor to accept a pre-configured pool for testing or flexibility.
Refactor accept method to use the connection pool instead of direct connection calls.
Remove toString method as it is no longer needed or relevant.
Simplify close method to delegate to the pool's close method.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Replace DefaultAzureCredential with ManagedIdentityCredential for Azure authentication
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.why_exists: DefaultAzureCredential is deprecated or removed in newer Azure SDK versions; ManagedIdentityCredential is the required replacement for managed identity scenarios

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Update AzureConfig property accessors to use method calls instead of field access
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.why_exists: AzureConfig class refactored to use getters instead of public fields, causing compile errors if fields are accessed directly
